hero.tagline: Classical line, street power — one dancer, every style.
hero.intro: From a first hip-hop routine at age five to the men's advanced ballet barre, Gavin moves across breaking, ballet, hip-hop, and contemporary — and he's just getting to the good part.

about.lede: Versatility isn't a side note in Gavin's training — it's the whole point.
paragraphs: Gavin has been dancing since he was five, when he started with a group hip-hop routine at Body Expressions. He added a new style nearly every year, and after three years earned a place on the company competitive team.

From there he kept widening his reach — joining a men's advanced ballet studio for classical line and control, while continuing to climb through the competitive circuit across every style. Advanced tumbling sharpened his tricks, and one-on-one hip-hop and breaking sessions shaped the signature style he carries today.

He's collected top awards and scholarships along the way. Now, heading into his senior year, his sights are set on the next stage: a high-level collegiate dance program and a professional career — all while aiming to finish high school above a 4.0 GPA.

disciplines.name: Breaking
disciplines.blurb: Floorwork, freezes, and power moves. The name says it — break the stage.

disciplines.name: Hip-Hop
disciplines.blurb: Where it all began. Groove and musicality, sharpened in one-on-one training.

disciplines.name: Ballet
disciplines.blurb: Men's advanced. The classical backbone behind every clean line he draws.

disciplines.name: Contemporary
disciplines.blurb: Extension, control, and real emotion carried through movement.

disciplines.name: Tumbling & Tricks
disciplines.blurb: Advanced tumbling that powers the biggest moments on stage.
